text: Being here, I feel a sense of curiosity and quiet anticipation. The angular geometry and cool lighting in the first space strike me as both welcoming and slightly uncanny—almost liminal, as if I am on the threshold of something new. Walking into the R+D area, I am drawn to the interplay between human intention and technological innovation. I feel like a small observer within a larger experiment, humbled and inspired by the pursuit of knowledge and possibility. This environment urges me to reflect on how spaces shape our sense of reality, purpose, and connection.
